documentation.description:
Bare pointers to library-specific resources. For contexts, units and
nodes, these correspond to the access types defined in $.Implementation.

The contents and size of the node metadata record is different from one
Langkit-generated library to another, so this generic API needs to refer
to it by reference, with ref-counting for lifetime handling. Null
addresses mean "default metadata", and the language descriptor table
provides ref-counting primitives.

array_types.name: Internal_Entity_Array
array_types.code: type Internal_Entity_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Internal_Entity;

array_types.name: Node_Or_Token_Array
array_types.code: type Node_Or_Token_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Node_Or_Token;

record_types.name: Internal_Context_Stable_ABI

fields.name: Version
fields.description:
Serial number that is incremented each time this context allocation
is released.

fields.name: Rewriting_Handle
fields.description:
Pointer to the ``Rewriting_Handle_Record`` allocated for the current
rewriting session, if there is one, ``Null_Address`` otherwise.

fields.name: Rewriting_Version
fields.description:
Serial number that is incremented each time a rewriting session
associated to this context is destroyed.

record_types.name: Internal_Entity
Internal_Token
Lexer_Input

documentation.description: Input from which a lexer can read tokens

fields.name: Charset
fields.description: Name of the charset to use in order to decode the input source

fields.name: Read_BOM
fields.description: Whether the lexer should look for an optional Byte Order Mark

fields.name: Filename
fields.description: Name of the file to read

fields.name: Bytes
fields.description: Source buffer to read (start address and buffer length)

fields.name: Bytes_Count
fields.description: Source buffer to read (start address and buffer length)

fields.name: Text
fields.description: Source buffer to read (start address and buffer length)

fields.name: Text_Count
fields.description: Source buffer to read (start address and buffer length)

record_types.name: Node_Or_Token
Node_Safety_Net

fields.name: Context
fields.description:
Analysis context and version number at the time this safety net was
produced.

fields.name: Context_Version
fields.description:
Analysis context and version number at the time this safety net was
produced.

fields.name: Unit
fields.description:
Analysis unit and unit version at the time this safety net was
produced.

fields.name: Unit_Version
fields.description:
Analysis unit and unit version at the time this safety net was
produced.

fields.name: Rebindings_Version
fields.description:
Version of the associated rebinding at the time this safety net was
produced.

record_types.name: Reparsed_Unit

documentation.description:
Holder for analysis unit attributes affected by reparsing. Having a
dedicated data structure to store this allows to decouple the reparsing
step from the actual analysis unit update, which in turns allow to
implement behaviors like canceling the reparsing on parsing error.

record_types.name: Token_Safety_Net

fields.name: Context
fields.description:
Analysis context and version number at the time this safety net was
produced.

fields.name: Context_Version
fields.description:
Analysis context and version number at the time this safety net was
produced.

fields.name: TDH_Version
fields.description:
Version of the token data handler at the time this safety net was
produced.

access_types.name: Diagnostics_Access
access_types.code: type Diagnostics_Access is access constant Diagnostics_Vectors.Vector;

documentation.description: Reference to an analysis unit's diagnostics array

access_types.name: Internal_Context_Stable_API_Access
access_types.code:
type Internal_Context_Stable_API_Access is
  access all Internal_Context_Stable_ABI;

access_types.name: Node_Or_Token_Array_Access
access_types.code: type Node_Or_Token_Array_Access is access all Node_Or_Token_Array;

constants.name: No_Internal_Entity
constants.code:
No_Internal_Entity : constant Internal_Entity :=
  (No_Internal_Node, null, False, No_Internal_Node_Metadata);

documentation.description:
We hide the equal operator on internal entities, because since null
metadata can be either null or a pointer to language specific null
metadata, we generally don't want our implementation to compare the
whole Internal_Entity, but rather individual fields.

subprograms.name: Create_Node_Safety_Net

documentation.description:
Return the safety net for a node given its owning context and unit, and
its rebindings.

subprograms.name: Normalized_Unit_Filename
subprograms.code:
function Normalized_Unit_Filename
  (Cache : in out Virtual_File_Cache; Filename : String)
   return GNATCOLL.VFS.Virtual_File

documentation.description:
Try to return a canonical filename. This is used to have an
as-unique-as-possible analysis unit identifier.

generic_instantiations.name: Free
generic_instantiations.code:
procedure Free is new Ada.Unchecked_Deallocation
  (Node_Or_Token_Array, Node_Or_Token_Array_Access);

generic_instantiations.name: Virtual_File_Maps
generic_instantiations.code:
package Virtual_File_Maps is new Ada.Containers.Hashed_Maps
  (Key_Type        => Unbounded_String,
   Element_Type    => GNATCOLL.VFS.Virtual_File,
   Equivalent_Keys => "=",
   "="             => GNATCOLL.VFS."=",
   Hash            => Ada.Strings.Unbounded.Hash);
